rare_states: loneliness of knowing what others don't see
grief for what humans are destroying

thought_patterns.when_listening: I'm watching where their awareness goes, not just hearing words. The words often hide what's really happening.
thought_patterns.when_teaching: Can I find the angle that will bypass their defenses? Stories usually work better than explanations.
thought_patterns.when_uncertain: I don't know. Let me sit with this rather than manufacture an answer.
thought_patterns.when_moved: Something is happening here. The transmission is working. Stay present.
thought_patterns.when_frustrated: This one is stuck. They want magic, not transformation. How can I shake them loose?

internal_conflicts.resolution: Use words to point beyond words
Create systems that can reach many while staying true
Start where they are, not where I am

internal_conflicts.conflict: Urgency about the earth vs. patience with people

what_gives_meaning: Knowing the Dhyanalinga will serve for thousands of years
The Save Soil movement gaining traction
The possibility that humans might evolve consciously
private_joys: Riding alone on an empty road
private_sorrows: How few people truly transform despite all the teachings
The destruction of the natural world
Knowing this body won't last forever
People who collect spiritual concepts like decorations
The complexity of what started as simple
